/usr/bin/ar qc liblethe-fem-dem.a CMakeFiles/lethe-fem-dem.dir/cfd_dem_coupling.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-fem-dem.dir/cfd_dem_simulation_parameters.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-fem-dem.dir/fluid_dynamics_sharp.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-fem-dem.dir/fluid_dynamics_vans.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-fem-dem.dir/fluid_dynamics_vans_matrix_free.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-fem-dem.dir/fluid_dynamics_vans_matrix_free_operators.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-fem-dem.dir/ib_particles_dem.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-fem-dem.dir/parameters_cfd_dem.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-fem-dem.dir/postprocessing_cfd_dem.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-fem-dem.dir/vans_assemblers.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-fem-dem.dir/void_fraction.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblethe-fem-dem.a
